Package core.reader

Class TabDelimitedReader

java.lang.Object
core.reader.TabDelimitedReader
All Implemented Interfaces:
Reader<Ledger>
public final class TabDelimitedReader extends Object implements Reader<Ledger>
A TabDelimitedReader reads the chart of accounts and transactions from a tab-delimited file.

See sample files in test/resources for examples. Skips blanks lines and lines that start with a '#'.
